subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Command in this Hour according to an established decree. Verily, there hath been sent down this Day that which was expounded unto Us, and We, verily, are witnesses unto all things. And at daybreak did We send down a Book unto him who formerly affirmed the Cause of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی العظیم. سبحان الذى نزل الامر فى الحین على امر مستقر و لقد نزل الیوم ما فصلت الینا و انا نحن لکل شاهدون و ان الصبح نزلنا کتابا الى الذى صدق امر ربک من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
